name: VIDT
changelog: 🎨 NEW: Video zoom and pan controls in Edit Videos tab
🔍 NEW: Zoom in/out with buttons or Ctrl+Mouse Wheel
🖱️ NEW: Pan video when zoomed (middle mouse or spacebar+drag)
👁️ FIXED: Layer visibility toggle now works correctly with eye icons
🚀 FIXED: Ghost window on startup completely eliminated
📊 IMPROVED: Profile download limit increased to 5000 videos
PREVIOUS: Independent text watermark and logo support
PREVIOUS: Timestamped subfolder creation for organized editing
PREVIOUS: Export all downloaded URLs feature
